free_text: Factors in the precision of slow neutron capture cross
section measurements using a simple Moxon-Rae
Crystal spectrometer at BNL high flux
Data have been corrected for multiple scattering, self
absorption, detector dead-time and background effects.
Total error estimated to be at most 1.0%.
Updated to new date formats, lower case.
This data is also corrected for hafnium impurity
